📝 Mayor's blog update (published: June 30, 2026)

On Tuesday, June 30, I was invited to the fiscal year 2026 Hanno City Red Cross Volunteer Corps general meeting held at the Comprehensive Welfare Center, where I offered remarks.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13879.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's remarks: Hanno City Red Cross Volunteer Corps general meeting, fiscal year 2026
